data.content: Final review request addressed: Branch `codex/foolery-c4db-worker-a` pushed to origin at commit `64cdfb844acffd1a9972c15da7bab9daed04bb29`. Added `part` to OpenCode approval extraction candidates and taught OpenCode HTTP event translation to preserve wrappers whose nested `part` is `permission.asked`, covering both `{ type: "event", part: { type: "permission.asked", ... } }` and field extraction from nested part payloads. Added focused approval visibility and HTTP preservation tests for wrapped permission events. Verification passed: focused approval/OpenCode tests, `bun run lint`, and `bunx tsc --noEmit`. Touched source files remain under 500 lines.
